title: Silk Touch Dirt Path│精準採集土徑
description: It can be obtained by breaking the dirt path with a shovel with Silk Touch.│可以透過使用帶有精準採集附魔的鏟子破壞土徑來獲得它。
body:
# 功能│Function
使用帶有精準採集附魔的鏟子破壞土徑之後會掉落土徑，否則掉落泥土。│Using a Silk Touch enchantment on a shovel to break a dirt path will drop the dirt path, otherwise it will drop dirt.
# 更多│More
[點我](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT)查看更多我的作品。│[Click me](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT) to see more of my works.
